objects.description: [BRICKSTORM](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9015) has communicated with C2 infrastructure via TLS.(Citation: CrowdStrike BRICKSTORM WARP PANDA UNC5221 December 2025)(Citation: CISA BRICKSTORM UNC5221 AR25-338A February 2026)(Citation: Picus Security BRICKSTORM UNC5221 October 2025)(Citation: Resecurity UNC5221 BRICKSTORM F5 Big-IP October 2025)
